claim: A screenshot claims a defense contract proves full approval for autonomous offensive AI use.
evidence: A procurement headline can show engagement without exposing the operative restrictions or red lines.
The visible source does not include the full contract text, policy annex, or use-case boundaries.
inference: This is a mixed defense claim. Procurement can be real while the leap to offensive autonomy approval remains unproven without primary policy text.
mitigation: Ask for the contract, solicitation, or official policy excerpt.
Separate procurement, experimentation, analysis support, and autonomous weapons approval into distinct findings.
